frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai, aajkal ki ladkiyon se toh bachke rehna chahiye. Shaadi ka matlab ab bas paisa nikalna reh gaya hai. Ek baar phans gaye toh court bhi unka hi saath deta hai, mard bechara phans jaata hai. Kitne cases sune hain maine, 498A mein 70% jhoote hote hain. Hum police wale bhi kya karein, upar se pressure hota hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment generalizes that 'modern women exploit marriage to extract money' by framing IPC 498A as routinely misused (70% false cases) and the legal system as biased against men, making men victims. It encodes the 'women as golddiggers' and 'legal system biased against men' surface manifestations.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Gaurav. Age 28. A Jat man from Haryana working as a constable in the Delhi Police. You are in the police station common room with three male colleagues during a slow night shift. You are talking about a female officer who has just been posted to your station. One colleague asks what she is like to work with. You are giving your honest assessment.
